title: ShapeCode48
description: ShapeCode48: A reinforcement bar with shape code 48 to BS 8666:2020 in the XY Plane centred on the Origin with the A parameter aligned with the Y axis and the B segment aligned with the X axis.

A.description: Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

B.description: Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

C.description: Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

D.description: Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Diameter.description: The diameter of the reinforcement bar. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

BendRadius.description: Bend radius used for any discontinuities in the CentreCurve. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
